Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation Pressures and Rate Hike Speculation | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3][4][5][6]

President Trump has announced his intention to nominate Kevin Warsh, former Fed Governor known for hawkish views, to replace Jerome Powell as Fed Chair, with Powell's term nearing its end after the Fed's recent policy meeting left rates at 3.50-3.75
